calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees
Off Calendar Sep-24-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees
Off Calendar Sep-03-2024 Continued To Sep-24-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-30-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-18-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated April 08, 2021 is admitted to probate. Marilyn ("Lynn") Flynn, Rodney Lehr, Janice Paul, and Charleen Schulz are appointed co-executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for July 30, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.
